name: State Bank & Trust Of Kenmare
description_short: Community bank with locations in North Dakota offering checking, savings, debit cards, and digital banking services across Kenmare, Berthold, and a drive-up branch.
description_long: State Bank & Trust of Kenmare is a charter member of the Independent Community Banks of North Dakota, operating as part of the Jorgenson Holding Company alongside sister institutions Citizens State Bank at Mohall and First National Bank & Trust of Williston. The bank has maintained local presence in the Kenmare area with additional branches in Berthold, positioning itself as a community-focused financial institution with the tagline 'We Have a Banker For You.' The organization is structured to serve both retail and business customers across northwestern North Dakota with traditional banking infrastructure. State Bank & Trust of Kenmare offers a comprehensive suite of deposit and service products including checking and savings accounts, Visa debit and gift cards, wire transfers, and safe deposit boxes. Digital banking capabilities include mobile banking with customized overdraft and fraud alerts, debit card lock features, digital wallet integration, eStatements, online banking, and access to the MoneyPass nationwide surcharge-free ATM network. They also provide traditional services such as direct deposit, ACH processing, notary services, coin counting, cashier's checks, 24-hour night depository, and bank-by-mail options, along with trust services. What distinguishes State Bank & Trust of Kenmare is its commitment to fee-conscious banking through the MoneyPass network, allowing customers to avoid ATM surcharges at thousands of locations nationwide. The bank emphasizes digital convenience with features like debit card on/off toggles to prevent fraud and the ability to load cards into digital wallets. Their multi-location presence with a dedicated drive-up branch and 24-hour night depository reflects responsiveness to customer accessibility needs. As a community bank, State Bank & Trust of Kenmare serves a geographically limited but well-served region. The primary limitation is restricted branch access limited to North Dakota locations, which constrains convenience for customers outside the service area. The website provides limited transparency on specific account features, fee structures, interest rates, or competitive product details that would enable comprehensive comparison with regional or national alternatives. For customers seeking traditional community banking with local relationship management and modern digital tools, the bank presents a viable option, though those seeking broader geographic reach or specialized financial products may need to evaluate alternatives. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Digital wallet integration for mobile and wearable devices
Mobile banking with customized alerts and debit card controls
Cashier's checks and Visa gift cards
Bank by mail and trust services
pros: MoneyPass nationwide surcharge-free ATM network access included with accounts
Mobile banking with customized fraud and overdraft alerts plus debit card lock feature
Digital wallet compatibility for debit cards on mobile and wearable devices
24-hour night depository available at main Kenmare location for after-hours deposits
Paperless eStatements with secure online access to past and current statements
Drive-up branch location (103 1st Ave SE) in addition to main office for customer convenience
Trust services offered in-house for estate and fiduciary planning
cons: Limited branch network restricted to North Dakota (Kenmare, Berthold, and drive-up only)
Website lacks specific details on account types, interest rates, and fee structures needed for comparison shopping
No indication of extended service hours or weekend banking availability beyond 'View Hours' placeholder links
Geographic limitation makes banking inconvenient for customers outside northwestern North Dakota
Limited information about business banking products, lending capabilities, or loan terms
best_for: North Dakota residents in the Kenmare and Berthold areas seeking community banking relationships
Customers prioritizing surcharge-free ATM access through the MoneyPass nationwide network
Rural and agricultural businesses in northwestern North Dakota requiring local banking and trust services
Individuals valuing digital banking security features like card locks and transaction alerts
diagnosis: State Bank & Trust of Kenmare is best suited for North Dakota residents in the Kenmare and Berthold areas who value community banking relationships and modern digital security features like fraud alerts and card locks. The primary caveat is that the bank's utility is geographically limited to northwestern North Dakota, making it impractical for customers outside this region or those requiring multi-state banking convenience.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
